title: Pentagon Triggers UFO Panic To Cover Up Iran Military Fail? 'Oversized Eyes, Hairless...’ | Watch
description: The Pentagon’s latest UFO bombshell has reignited global fascination with extraterrestrial life after newly declassified files and explosive claims from former intelligence-linked researchers suggested the US may have recovered remains of “four different alien species.”

title: Sir Keir Starmer urged to release UK's UFO files
description: British Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer has been urged to follow the lead of US President Donald Trump by releasing "every UK UFO file held by the MoD, the RAF, and intelligence agencies".

title: 'Mind-Boggling' Trump UFO Drop Triggers Chilling Warning: Humanity Has Just Lost Its Spot at the Top
description: A massive release of Pentagon UFO records has sparked global interest in unexplained aerial phenomena (UAP) transparency.

title: Bombshell reason why UFO files were hidden for years finally revealed
description: Harvard scientist explains why officials hid UFO files for yearsA new batch of the UFO files is out after years of being hidden in the government's vault.Now, a Harvard physicist made a bombshell claim on why the files may have been kept away from the public.His name is Avi Loeb.And he explains...

title: UFO Investigators Claim Skinwalker Ranch and Sedona May Be Connected by Secret Underground Military Tunnels
description: Investigators explore claims of a hidden tunnel system linking Sedona and Skinwalker Ranch, sparking theories of military activity and unexplained sightings in these UFO hotspots.
